title: Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web

Title: Users are unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the Web

User impact: Users are unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the Web.

Current status: We're reviewing service monitoring telemetry to isolate the source of the issue and establish a fix.

Scope of impact: Your organization is affected by this event, and some users attempting to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the Web are impacted.

Title: Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web

Current status: We've collected and are analyzing HAR traces from affected users to help us determine our next troubleshooting steps for remediating the impact.

Title: Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web

User impact: Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web.

Current status: Our HAR trace analysis has focused our investigation to a token failure that we believe could be preventing the opening of email attachments for users in Outlook on the web. We're further analyzing the isolated failure to confirm our findings and so our next troubleshooting steps for remediating the impact can be determined. 

Scope of impact: Some users attempting to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web are impacted. This information may be updated as our investigation continues.
